description: Simple bucket-style tote made from light blue denim with a central seam and finished with sturdy khaki webbing handles.
Denim tote featuring vertical orange floral embroidery on the front panel, repurposed jean waistband with button closure at top, and double denim shoulder straps.
Structured denim tote crafted from reclaimed jean legs, showcasing an authentic back-pocket patch, belt-loop waistband detail, and contrasting olive-green webbing straps.
